tagline: The Complete Learning + Assessment + Coding Ecosystem for Colleges
description: Managed learning, teaching, and performance with role-based control.
section_subheading: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to transform the educational experience.

capabilities.title: College LMS (Multi-College Ready)
capabilities.subtitle: Unified governance for multi-campus institutions
capabilities.description: Onboard multiple colleges with isolated admin controls and deep analytics.
features: Role-based access: Admin, HOD, Educator, Learner
Course assignment by groups / batches / classes
Isolated admin controls for each college

capabilities.title: Groups & Cohort Management
capabilities.subtitle: Streamlined batch and class management
capabilities.description: Empower teachers and admins to manage student groups effectively.
features: Groups creation by Teachers or Admin
Real-time progress tracking and completion reports

capabilities.title: Course Learning Experience
capabilities.subtitle: Video + Quiz + Coding integrated learning
capabilities.description: A rich, interactive learning environment that ensures retention.
features: Structured learning paths with progress tracking

capabilities.title: Test Series Platform
capabilities.subtitle: Comprehensive Aptitude & Coding assessments
capabilities.description: Evaluate students with auto-graded aptitude and coding tests.
features: Create Test Series with multiple Tests

capabilities.title: Coding LMS
capabilities.subtitle: Dedicated coding competitive platform
capabilities.description: Build a strong coding culture with structured practice and contests.
features: Structured problem solving with difficulty levels

capabilities.title: Video LMS
capabilities.subtitle: Video-first lightweight learning
capabilities.description: Ideal for training libraries, recorded sessions, and seminars.
features: Perfect for revision and supplementary content

why_section.heading: Why Education OS?
why_section.subheading: One platform for learning + assessment + coding + contests
